# templateWillDisappear(_:animated:)

**Instance Method**

Tells the delegate that the template will disappear from the screen.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor optional func templateWillDisappear(_ aTemplate: CPTemplate, animated: Bool)
```

## Parameters

- **animated**: A Boolean value indicating whether the system animates the disappearance of the template.

## Handling Display Events

- **templateWillAppear(_:animated:)**: Tells the delegate that the template will appear onscreen.
- **templateDidAppear(_:animated:)**: Tells the delegate that the template did appear onscreen.
- **templateDidDisappear(_:animated:)**: Tells the delegate that the template did disappear from the screen.
